Victor Velaryon
Allegiance House Velaryon
Race Valyrian
Culture Crownlands
Born 2–50 AC[1]
Father Daemon Velaryon
Book Fire & Blood (mentioned)

Victor Velaryon was a member of House Velaryon during the reign of King Jaehaerys I Targaryen.[2]

History[ ]

Victor and his brothers Jorgen and Corwyn escorted King Jaehaerys I Targaryen and Queen Alysanne Targaryen when they flew their dragons to Driftmark in 50 AC and toured the shipyards of the island.[2]

Family[ ]

Victor was one of the children (possibly the youngest) of Lord Daemon Velaryon,[2] the Lord of the Tides and the head of House Velaryon during the reign of kings Maegor I and Jaehaerys I Targaryen.[3][2]
